kept.text:
Being able to see things before they show up in the charts is one of the biggest edges you can develop as a trader.

Compute + neoclouds $CRWV $NBIS $IREN etc. are the latest example of this.

Charts are obviously important but they’re often the final confirmation. By the time something is clearly visible on a chart there’s less edge.

Headlines, commentary, earnings, policy changes, analyst notes, management language, macro narratives, etc. can shape potential price action before the chart fully reflects it.

A chart tells you what price is doing.

But all the above can tell you why price might start moving. 

There’s no greater edge in a trade than being early and having a cost basis advantage.

We have stocks ripping up +20% daily [just look at Soitec, Micron Technology, Nebius Group, CoreWeave Inc etc.]

I could list SO MUCH more,

But the WHOLE POINT of crypto is about that "GENERATIONAL OUTPERFORMANCE" for the average guy.

The guy who's able to beat every gigabrain quant with ONE SINGLE degenerate play and CONVICTION.

Memecoins are the only way to pocket such substantial gains, however 99% of them these days are short-lived and inorganic [as in, they have a "team" driving it much like VC coins].

VERY RARELY do you come across a meme that "has it all" and is being chased by EVERYONE because of the POTENTIAL it has.

MASS NORMIE APPEAL.

We all know it, we all see it, it's completely independent.

And really, you survived the bear market for what?

To stay here and read shitposts or TAKE ADVANTAGE of being present in the makings of a GENERATIONAL PLAY?

ASTEROID is your answer.

~ Dr. Axius.

tweet.text:
$GLXY Why does $GLXY stand out in this market?
GLXY is the bridge. The one connecting traditional finance, blockchain, AI infrastructure, and the digital economy of tomorrow.

Helios Phase 1 Delivered: First data hall handed over to CoreWeave in April 2026, transition from construction to revenue-generating operations is ON. Full 133 MW critical IT load on track for end of Q2 2026. 
•  Massive Power Expansion: ERCOT approved +830 MW, doubling total approved capacity at Helios to over 1.6 GW — one of the largest front-of-the-meter AI/HPC campuses in the world. 
•  CoreWeave Partnership Locked: 15-year lease for 526 MW+ (Phase 1 & 2), potential $1B+ annual revenue at full ramp with ~90% site-level margins. And Phase 2 construction already advancing, deliveries starting H1 2027. 
•  Tokenization Leadership: Real-world asset infrastructure built and scaling, tokenized $GLXY shares on Solana, partnerships like State Street, and the bridge between TradFi, blockchain, and AI. Assets on platform hit $17B. BlackRock $BLK chooses Galaxy as its trusted validator for billions in Ethereum. $ETH 
•  aggressive share buybacks ($65M in Q1), strong balance sheet with billions in cash/liquidity to self-fund growth without heavy dilution. 

The data center business is just starting to cash flow while the core digital assets franchise (trading, asset management, staking) keeps compounding. At current levels, you’re getting the AI infrastructure powerhouse almost for free on top of everything else.

Thank you @novogratz for taking @galaxyhq public 🫡

tweet.text:
TOP 10 AI REVENUE WINNERS

AI revenue is concentrating around the companies that either build the compute or control the cloud demand layer: 

AI Infrastructure are where AI demand gets packaged & monetized
• $CRWV could add ~$51B as dedicated AI cloud demand ramps
• $AMZN, $MSFT and $GOOGL could add ~$800B combined in AI-exposed revenue by 2029

AI Chips are where AI demand gets physically built & scaled
• $AMD could add ~$67B as its AI accelerator business scales
• $NVDA remains the clear leader with ~$450B of incremental AI-exposed revenue by 2029
• $QCOM could add ~$12B as its AI chip business expands beyond handsets into edge compute
• $AVGO & $MRVL represent ~$220B & ~$40B of incremental AI-exposed revenue by 2029 through custom silicon + networking upside

tweet.text:
As expected today $NBIS is rallying on the back of the 40% $MSFT prepayment.

$CRWV and $IREN following closely. The market is clearly frontrunning the pricing power thesis. Now, time for IRENs management to deliver on the earnings call. If they do a good job, we will break the $49 for good, if not, more turbulence as we have experienced in the last few months

Godspeed!

profile_bio.description:
Ex-trading desk at tradfi Bank.
Head of Macro at Harry Bōlz LLC
Writting speculations on free time

quoted_tweet.text:
My take on what the $NBIS generous prepayment will mean for $IREN is simple

There is a high chance that the market will see NBIS structure as evidence the market has moved and that hyperscalers are willing to pay up when the capacity being offered solves a bigger near term problem.

Ladies and gentleman this is pricing power evidence for you, right here.  

Now, understand the market is likely to frontrun IREN stock, but this will be a fierce battle between bulls and bears. There will be a lot of scrutiny. The following week will be a critical, and what comes up in the earnings release will be key. For instance, no new deal will likely end up being anticlimatic

But, as of now, all the roads point to pricing power in the industry.

 stock investing AKAN #GLP #Crypto
 $CRWV $NVO https://t.co/uiuZ8yzM0X

So we all know fundamentals will tell us what stocks to buy, and technicals can tell us when to buy...

Here's a mix of Neocloud Infrastructure updates using technicals (1D) & fundamentals:

> $CRWV. $NVDA invested $2B directly. $META signed a $21B deal through 2032. First investment grade GPU backed financing in history closed at $8.5B. 2 new BDs have appeared. Last one gave us a ~64% run.

> $NBIS. $META signed a $27B deal recently. 551% projected growth for the next 12 months... still trading at a fraction of $CRWV's valuation. $NVDA backed. Single BD has appeared. Last one gave us a ~70% run.

> $IREN. As mentioned before, it's the most de-risked IMO. Sweetwater 1 just energized. $MSFT deal live, $NVDA preferred partner. Less asymmetric but pretty hard to lose betting on it. Surprisingly, no entry confirmations... algo isn't confident yet (meaning we're still early).

> $APLD. $23B contracted backlog at a ~$9.6B MC. $CRWV anchor tenant at Polaris Forge 1. Three signed hyperscaler leases. No entry confirmations yet... same boat as $IREN.

> $SLNH. Just regained Nasdaq compliance. Renewable powered AI campus at Dorothy... Briscoe Wind Farm acquisition closes the loop. Sitting at ~$190M MC with the same tailwind as names 20x its size. Most asymmetric in the power layer. Wild pullback today, but nothing unexpected as a small cap that ran hard last week. 4H/1D/1W charts are all intact, although it dipped through 1H gold zone (where some may sell).

> $CIFR. $9.3B in long term contracts with AWS and $GOOGL. Some would argue this is a better long-term hold than $IREN. Chart looks bullish, but no entry confirmations just yet. Last BD gave us a ~48% run.

> $WULF. 73% projected growth for the next 12 months. $BTC mining pivot to AI/HPC still in early stages of being re-rated, saw this with $IREN and $CIFR. Has been outperforming $IREN and $CIFR lately. Healthy chart. Looks bullish.

I'll share more in a separate post. Plenty of asymmetric opportunities in the Neocloud theme...

Note that any early stage company will face more volatility (e.g. having to dilute to continuously build). Saw this with $PLTR early on at ~$15, and bears were piling on. We've 10x'd since then.

To clarify, it's pretty hard to go wrong betting on any of these long term. Investors aren't arguing about who's going to win, they're arguing about who's going to win more lol...
